metadata.description: Customer onboarding and management solution for enterprise CRM

plugins.name: AccountValidationPlugin
plugins.description: Validates account data before update operations including revenue checks and duplicate detection

plugins.name: OpportunityScoringPlugin
plugins.description: Automatically scores opportunities based on customer history and deal parameters

plugins.name: NotificationServicePlugin
plugins.description: Sends notifications to relevant stakeholders when account data changes

functional_flows.description: When Account is modified, Account Approval Workflow is triggered, invoking AccountValidationPlugin, NotificationServicePlugin
When Contact is modified, Contact Synchronization is triggered
When Opportunity is modified, Opportunity Pipeline Process is triggered, invoking OpportunityScoringPlugin

sections.title: Solution Overview
sections.content:
# Solution Overview

## 1. Introduction

This document provides a comprehensive overview of the solution, detailing its purpose, scope, and high-level architecture. The solution is designed to manage and automate key sales and customer relationship processes within Microsoft Dynamics.

### 1.1. Purpose

The primary purpose of this solution is to streamline and formalize the management of core commercial entities: Accounts, Contacts, and Opportunities. It introduces structured business processes, data validation, and automated workflows to enhance data quality, improve operational efficiency, and ensure process compliance.

### 1.2. Scope

The solution's scope is centered around three primary functional modules. It includes customizations to three core entities, supported by a set of workflows and plug-ins to execute business logic.

**Functional Modules:**
*   Account Management
*   Contact Management
*   Opportunity Management

**Solution Components:**
*   **Entities:** 3 (Account, Contact, Opportunity)
*   **Workflows:** 3
*   **Plug-ins:** 3

---

## 2. High-Level Architecture

The solution is built upon the standard Dynamics 365 data model, extending the `Account`, `Contact`, and `Opportunity` entities. The architecture employs a combination of synchronous and asynchronous processes to achieve its objectives.

*   **Data Model:** The solution customizes core entities by adding or utilizing specific fields to support the defined business processes. User interaction is managed through standard forms like `Account Main Form` and `Contact Main Form`.
*   **Process Automation:** Business processes are orchestrated via workflows. These workflows are triggered by data changes (create or update operations) and execute a series of defined steps, such as routing for approval or creating follow-up tasks.
*   **Custom Logic:** Custom code, packaged as plug-ins, is used to implement complex validation and business logic that cannot be achieved with out-of-the-box workflows. These plug-ins are registered on specific events in the Dynamics 365 pipeline (e.g., Pre-operation, Post-operation) to ensure timely execution.

The diagram below illustrates the relationships between the core components.

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph Account Management
        A[Account Entity] -->|Triggers Update| WF1(Account Approval Workflow)
        A -->|Uses| P1(AccountValidationPlugin)
        A -->|Uses| P3(NotificationServicePlugin)
        WF1 -->|Invokes| P1
        WF1 -->|Invokes| P3
    end

    subgraph Opportunity Management
        O[Opportunity Entity] -->|Triggers Create| WF2(Opportunity Pipeline Process)
        O -->|Uses| P2(OpportunityScoringPlugin)
        WF2 -->|Invokes| P2
    end

    subgraph Contact Management
        C[Contact Entity] -->|Triggers Update| WF3(Contact Synchronization)
    end

    style A fill:#D6EAF8,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style O fill:#D6EAF8,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style C fill:#D6EAF8,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style WF1 fill:#D5F5E3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style WF2 fill:#D5F5E3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style WF3 fill:#D5F5E3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style P1 fill:#FCF3CF,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style P2 fill:#FCF3CF,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style P3 fill:#FCF3CF,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
```

---

## 3. Functional Modules

### 3.1. Account Management

This module governs the lifecycle and data integrity of Account records.

*   **Primary Entity:** `Account`
*   **Key Fields:** `accountname`, `revenue`, `statuscode`, `emailaddress1`, `telephone1`, `address1_city`, `ownerid`
*   **User Interface:** `Account Main Form`, `Account Quick Create`
*   **Automation:**
    *   **Account Approval Workflow:** A process triggered on `Update` of an Account. It orchestrates an approval cycle with the following steps:
        1.  Validate account data
        2.  Check approval threshold
        3.  Route to manager for approval
        4.  Send approval notification email
        5.  Update account status
    *   **AccountValidationPlugin:** A `Pre-operation` plug-in that executes on Account `Update` to enforce data validation rules before the record is saved.
    *   **NotificationServicePlugin:** A `Post-operation` plug-in that executes on Account `Update` to handle the dispatch of notifications.

### 3.2. Opportunity Management

This module standardizes the creation and initial handling of new sales Opportunities.

*   **Primary Entity:** `Opportunity`
*   **Key Fields:** `name`, `estimatedvalue`, `closeprobability`, `customerid`, `statuscode`, `estimatedclosedate`
*   **Automation:**
    *   **Opportunity Pipeline Process:** A workflow triggered on `Create` of an Opportunity. It automates the initial sales pipeline stages:
        1.  Qualify lead source
        2.  Assign sales representative
        3.  Create follow-up task
        4.  Send welcome email to customer
        5.  Schedule initial meeting
    *   **OpportunityScoringPlugin:** A `Post-operation` plug-in that runs on Opportunity `Create`. It is invoked by the pipeline process to calculate a score for the new opportunity.

### 3.3. Contact Management

This module focuses on maintaining Contact data and synchronizing it with external systems.

*   **Primary Entity:** `Contact`
*   **Key Fields:** `firstname`, `lastname`, `emailaddress1`, `telephone1`, `parentcustomerid`, `jobtitle`
*   **User Interface:** `Contact Main Form`
*   **Automation:**
    *   **Contact Synchronization:** A workflow triggered on `Update` of a Contact. It manages data synchronization with an external system through the following steps:
        1.  Detect field changes
        2.  Sync to external CRM
        3.  Update audit log
        4.  Notify account manager

---

## 4. Core Component Summary

### 4.1. Entities and Fields

| Entity | Key Fields |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Account** | `accountname`, `emailaddress1`, `telephone1`, `statuscode`, `address1_city`, `revenue`, `ownerid` |
| **Contact** | `firstname`, `lastname`, `emailaddress1`, `telephone1`, `parentcustomerid`, `jobtitle` |
| **Opportunity** | `name`, `estimatedvalue`, `closeprobability`, `customerid`, `statuscode`, `estimatedclosedate` |

### 4.2. Workflows

| Workflow | Trigger Entity | Trigger Event | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Account Approval Workflow** | Account | Update | Validates account data, manages a multi-step approval process with manager routing and notifications, and updates the final account status. |
| **Opportunity Pipeline Process** | Opportunity | Create | Manages the initial stages of a new opportunity, including lead qualification, sales rep assignment, task creation, and customer communication. |
| **Contact Synchronization** | Contact | Update | Detects changes on a contact record and synchronizes them to an external system, while also handling auditing and internal notifications. |

### 4.3. Plug-ins

| Plug-in | Trigger Entity | Operation | Stage | Purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **AccountValidationPlugin** | Account | Update | Pre-operation | Enforces data validation rules before an Account record is updated. Invoked by the `Account Approval Workflow`. |
| **OpportunityScoringPlugin** | Opportunity | Create | Post-operation | Calculates a score for a newly created Opportunity record. Invoked by the `Opportunity Pipeline Process`. |
| **NotificationServicePlugin** | Account | Update | Post-operation | Handles the sending of notifications after an Account record has been updated. Invoked by the `Account Approval Workflow`. |
